name: git-guard
description: PreToolUse(Bash) guard that denies force-type git push operations only. Catches `git push --force`, `git push -f`, `git push --force-with-lease`, and `git push <remote> +<ref>` (refspec-level force). Hook-bypass (--no-verify) NOT blocked — left to user discipline. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_GIT_GUARD=1.
